creator: draco@marino.st
text:
It looks like Eclipse is deleting older release distributions, so jetty 
8.1.8 doesn't fetch now (8.1.11 is the latest of 8 series, 9.0.3 is 
latest of all releases).

Since this PR got no response, and it's pretty important because of the 
Eclipse master site patch, should this PR be timed out?  Or split into 
two pieces?

Regardless if Jetty is fixed, the master sites desperately needs 
updating, it's very obsolete.
